mappings.rationaleAI: Nutrition and nutrient processing are fundamental requirements for sustaining life.
Food provides the essential nutrients that organisms procure and process to sustain biological function.
Plants are the foundation of nutrition in most ecosystems, producing the organic matter that sustains food webs.
Fruits are nutrient sources central to the nutrition of organisms.
Nutrition is the direct subject of this section on nutrient procurement.
The liver processes nutrients as part of the nutritional system of organisms.
Digestion is the process of nutrient procurement and processing treated here.
